docs.description: Thin-scrollbar wrapper with vertical, horizontal, or both overflow directions.

notes.title: Orientation
notes.content: 3 modes via orientation prop — vertical (default), horizontal, or both. Uses scrollbar-thin Tailwind utility.

notes.title: Wrapper Only
notes.content: ScrollArea is a pure wrapper that adds thin scrollbar styling. It renders no visual output of its own.
